title: muehlenbeckia gunnii
intro: Muehlenbeckia gunnii, also known as the New Zealand wire vine, is a climbing plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its delicate, star-shaped flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Muehlenbeckia gunnii include its ability to soothe coughs and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
